'''goshashaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:vogueing|vogueing]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-sh-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:vogueing|vogueing]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| goshashaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:goshashithi|goshashithi]] || [[word:goshashiji|goshashiji]] || [[word:goshashishi|goshashishi]] || [[word:goshashiki|goshashiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:goshashuthuthu|goshashuthuthu]] || [[word:goshashujuju|goshashujuju]] || [[word:goshashushushu|goshashushushu]] || [[word:goshashukuku|goshashukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:goshashuthu|goshashuthu]] || [[word:goshashuju|goshashuju]] || [[word:goshashushu|goshashushu]] || [[word:goshashuku|goshashuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:goshashufthuf|goshashufthuf]] || [[word:goshashufjuf|goshashufjuf]] || [[word:goshashufshuf|goshashufshuf]] || [[word:goshashufkuf|goshashufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:goshashethe|goshashethe]] || [[word:goshasheje|goshasheje]] || [[word:goshasheshe|goshasheshe]] || [[word:goshasheke|goshasheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:goshashothotho|goshashothotho]] || [[word:goshashojojo|goshashojojo]] || [[word:goshashoshosho|goshashoshosho]] || [[word:goshashokoko|goshashokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:goshashotho|goshashotho]] || [[word:goshashojo|goshashojo]] || [[word:goshashosho|goshashosho]] || [[word:goshashoko|goshashoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:goshashofthof|goshashofthof]] || [[word:goshashofjof|goshashofjof]] || [[word:goshashofshof|goshashofshof]] || [[word:goshashofkof|goshashofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:goshashĂŻfthĂŻf|goshashĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:goshashĂŻfjĂŻf|goshashĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:goshashĂŻfshĂŻf|goshashĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:goshashĂŻfkĂŻf|goshashĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:goshashĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|goshashĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:goshashĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|goshashĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:goshashĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|goshashĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:goshashĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|goshashĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:goshashĂŻfthĂŻf|goshashĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:goshashĂŻfjĂŻf|goshashĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:goshashĂŻfshĂŻf|goshashĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:goshashĂŻfkĂŻf|goshashĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:goshashĂŻfthĂŻf|goshashĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:goshashĂŻfjĂŻf|goshashĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:goshashĂŻfshĂŻf|goshashĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:goshashĂŻfkĂŻf|goshashĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:goshashĂŠthĂŠ|goshashĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:goshashĂŠjĂŠ|goshashĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:goshashĂŠshĂŠ|goshashĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:goshashĂŠkĂŠ|goshashĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:goshashathatha|goshashathatha]] || [[word:goshashajaja|goshashajaja]] || [[word:goshashashasha|goshashashasha]] || [[word:goshashakaka|goshashakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:goshashatha|goshashatha]] || [[word:goshashaja|goshashaja]] || [[word:goshashasha|goshashasha]] || [[word:goshashaka|goshashaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:goshashafthaf|goshashafthaf]] || [[word:goshashafjaf|goshashafjaf]] || [[word:goshashafshaf|goshashafshaf]] || [[word:goshashafkaf|goshashafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:goshashasha|goshashasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:goshashĂ«sha|goshashĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshashrosha|goshashrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshashmusha|goshashmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshashyasha|goshashyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogoshashnkshĂ«sha|gogoshashnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogoshashnkrosha|gogoshashnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogoshashnkmusha|gogoshashnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gogoshashnkyasha|gogoshashnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:goshashashasha|goshashashasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:goshashashĂ«sha|goshashashĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshashashrosha|goshashashrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshashashmusha|goshashashmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshashashyasha|goshashashyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogoshashashnkshĂ«sha|gogoshashashnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogoshashashnkrosha|gogoshashashnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogoshashashnkmusha|gogoshashashnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gogoshashashnkyasha|gogoshashashnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:geshĂŠshasha|geshĂŠshasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:geshĂŠshĂ«sha|geshĂŠshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:geshĂŠshrosha|geshĂŠshrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:geshĂŠshmusha|geshĂŠshmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:geshĂŠshyasha|geshĂŠshyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogeshĂŠshnkshĂ«sha|gogeshĂŠshnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogeshĂŠshnkrosha|gogeshĂŠshnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogeshĂŠshnkmusha|gogeshĂŠshnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gogeshĂŠshnkyasha|gogeshĂŠshnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:goshfashasha|goshfashasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:goshfashĂ«sha|goshfashĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshfashrosha|goshfashrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshfashmusha|goshfashmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshfashyasha|goshfashyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogoshfashnkshĂ«sha|gogoshfashnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogoshfashnkrosha|gogoshfashnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogoshfashnkmusha|gogoshfashnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gogoshfashnkyasha|gogoshfashnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|28ebc72}}
